collectiondata.overview:
Tulip Whispers & Canal Murmurs: The Netherlands Reimagined with Travelxploria

When dawn’s first light glimmers on glassy canals and the air fills with the delicate perfume of blossoms, the Netherlands feels like a waking dream. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, inventive Best Tour Operator, and globally renowned Best International Tour Operator, every moment becomes a brushstroke in your own Dutch masterpiece. Select our Best Package of Netherlands, share wonder on the Best Family package, or let every romantic detail bloom under our Best Honeymoon Planner.

Soft reflections dance beneath Amsterdam’s gabled facades as you glide past silent houseboats. Travelxploria arranges a moonlit canal serenade—handpicked harpists drift melodies across ripples, while lantern-lit cafés on hidden quays offer cinnamon-kissed speculaas and velvet-smooth Dutch cocoa.

Further afield, windmills stand guard over emerald fields where artisan cheesemakers pore over bubbling vats. In Zaanse Schans, children’s laughter twines with the wooden thump of molens’ turning blades under our Best Family package, as little hands shape fresh curds into velvety rounds.

When spring unfolds its rainbow, Keukenhof’s endless tulip cathedrals beckon. Through Travelxploria’s Best Package of Netherlands, you’ll wander secret bulb orchards before sunrise—where dewdrops tremble on petals and horticulturists share whispers of bulb stories handed down through centuries.

Rotterdam pulses with futuristic edge—a Ferris wheel spun into the skyline, avant-garde galleries hidden within shipping containers. Your Best International Tour Operator privileges include a rooftop picnic atop the Markthal, sampling gastronomic riffs on herring sliders while panoramic windows reflect the city’s daring architecture.

In Utrecht, vine-draped wharves cradle intimate cafés beneath sandstone arches. Let our Best Honeymoon Planner orchestrate a floating dinner aboard a silent barge, where orchids drift by on dark waters and church bells toll in the distance—an evening woven from whispered vows and candlelit lullabies.

Beyond the bustle, the quiet village of Giethoorn feels cradled by time itself. Under the Best Family package, paddles part glassy lanes lined with thatched cottages, and dragonflies flit like living jewels across sunlit pools.

Finally, Kinderdijk’s windmills silhouette against burnished skies—17 towering Guardians of Water and Wind. Guided by Travelxploria, you’ll cycle along ancient dikes beneath flaming cotton-candy clouds, each turn revealing new vistas of polder-carved landscapes.

With Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, visionary Best Tour Operator, and world-class Best International Tour Operator—the Netherlands awakens not just as a destination, but as a living poem, ready to be written by you.

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s elegant and cultural capital.

  • Discover Vienna’s grand architecture and royal heritage.

  • Enjoy Vienna at your own pace.

  • Journey to the fairytale city of Prague.

  • Visit the historic Prague Castle complex.

  • Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval town.

  • Bid farewell with memories of Central Europe’s finest gems.

Arrive in Budapest, Hungary’s enchanting capital straddling the Danube River, where history and modern charm blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport or station, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax or begin exploring the nearby surroundings. Whether it's strolling along the scenic banks of the Danube or discovering the grandeur of historic landmarks like the Parliament Building or Chain Bridge, Budapest welcomes you with its rich culture and warm hospitality. Your Central European journey begins in this captivating city known for its thermal baths, vibrant streets, and architectural wonders.

Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

Experience pure relaxation with a visit to the renowned Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of Europe’s largest and most iconic spa complexes. With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours, offering comfortable seating and picturesque views of the countryside along the way. Departing from Budapest’s Keleti Railway Station, you’ll head west toward Austria’s sophisticated capital. Upon arrival at Vienna’s central station, make your way to your hotel and settle in. The rest of the day is free for you to begin exploring the elegant streets, grand palaces, and cultural richness that define Vienna, setting the tone for the next chapter of your journey.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Vienna, a city that effortlessly blends imperial grandeur with vibrant modern culture. Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. For nature lovers, the beautifully manicured gardens of Schönbrunn Palace or the Prater Park offer a peaceful escape. Whether indulging in local cuisine, shopping for souvenirs, or simply soaking in the city’s timeless charm, Vienna promises a relaxing and enriching experience.

Explore Prague Castle, one of the largest and most magnificent ancient castles in the world, with a guided tour by Travelxploria. Walk through the historic Castle District, where an expert guide will share fascinating stories about its royal past and architectural marvels. Visit the awe-inspiring St. Vitus Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic design, and wander along the charming Golden Lane, lined with colorful historic houses. This immersive tour provides a deeper understanding of Prague’s rich heritage, blending royalty, legend, and breathtaking scenery. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this unforgettable journey offers the best way to experience Prague Castle’s splendor.

Just a short drive from Prague, embark on a magical day trip to Cesky Krumlov, a UNESCO World Heritage site, with the best on-ground support from Travelxploria. This fairy-tale town boasts a well-preserved medieval center, charming cobblestone streets, and a breathtaking castle overlooking the Vltava River. Stroll through its winding alleys, admire the picturesque architecture, and soak in the scenic river views. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, you’ll uncover the town’s rich history and enchanting beauty. This tour promises an unforgettable experience, making Cesky Krumlov a must-visit destination for history lovers and travelers seeking timeless charm.

As your unforgettable journey through Central Europe comes to a close, it’s time to bid farewell to the magical city of Prague. After breakfast, check out from your hotel and meet your transfer to the airport or train station for your onward journey. Reflect on the incredible experiences—from Budapest’s thermal baths and Vienna’s imperial elegance to Prague’s fairy-tale charm. With your heart full of memories, stunning photos, and meaningful souvenirs, you leave with a deeper appreciation for Europe’s cultural treasures. Though your trip ends here, the stories and moments you've collected will stay with you for a lifetime.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European adventure in the vibrant British capital.

  • Explore iconic sights by land and water, topped with stunning views.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with panoramic skyline vistas.

  • Meet lifelike wax figures of global celebrities and icons.

  • Travel seamlessly to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • See Parisian highlights and ascend the Eiffel Tower.

  • Admire masterpieces in one of the world’s greatest art museums.

  • Journey to Belgium’s charming capital city.

  • Explore Grand Place, Atomium, and historic architecture.

  • Enjoy a scenic rail journey to the Dutch capital.

  • Discover Amsterdam’s charm from its streets and waterways.

  • Visit fairy-tale villages and traditional windmills.

  • Conclude your journey with unforgettable European memories.

Arrive in the iconic city of London, where history, culture, and modernity blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport, a friendly representative will greet you and assist with your transfer to the hotel. Begin your day by visiting one of London’s most iconic landmarks—Tower Bridge. Walk along its glass-floored high-level walkways and marvel at the panoramic views of the River Thames and surrounding cityscape. Learn about the bridge’s fascinating history through interactive exhibits in the Tower Bridge Exhibition. Afterward, head to The Shard, Western Europe’s tallest building, and take a high-speed elevator to the viewing platform. From the top, enjoy breathtaking 360-degree views of London’s skyline, including sights like St. Paul’s Cathedral, the London Eye, and the Tower of London. This experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and stunning cityscapes.

Experience the glamour and excitement of Madame Tussauds London with your pre-booked entrance ticket, granting you seamless access to one of the world’s most iconic wax museums. Get up close with incredibly lifelike figures of global celebrities, world leaders, sports legends, and historical icons. Walk the red carpet alongside Hollywood stars, meet the British Royal Family, and strike a pose with your favorite pop stars. Don’t miss the immersive experiences like the Marvel Super Heroes 4D cinema and the Spirit of London ride. It’s a fun, interactive attraction that promises unforgettable moments and fantastic photo opportunities for all ages.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.package_name: Canals, Cobblestones & Beer Halls: A Northern Europe Trilogy
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant Dutch capital.

  • Explore Amsterdam’s highlights with a guided city and scenic canal tour.

  • Enjoy a traditional Dutch countryside day trip.

  • Travel to Frankfurt and unwind in the city.

  • Discover Frankfurt’s blend of modern architecture and historic charm.

  • Journey to Munich, the heart of Bavaria.

  • Visit two fairytale castles nestled in the Bavarian Alps.

  • Explore medieval Rothenburg and the unique Ries crater region.

  • Depart from Munich with unforgettable memories of your European adventure.

Embark on a captivating day trip from Munich to Rothenburg ob der Tauber and the Nördlinger Ries. Begin with a scenic drive to Rothenburg, a beautifully preserved medieval town known for its half-timbered houses, cobblestone streets, and charming old-world atmosphere. Stroll through the historic town center, visit the medieval walls, and explore unique shops and cafes. Continue to the fascinating Nördlinger Ries, a vast crater formed by a meteorite impact 15 million years ago. Discover the quaint town of Nördlingen, built within the crater, and learn about its unique geological history. This day offers a perfect blend of culture and nature.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Paris and begin your European adventure.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and enjoy Eiffel Tower access.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to Brussels and relax in the Belgian capital.

  • Explore Brussels' iconic sights and local culture.

  • Head to Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant city.

  • Experience Amsterdam’s highlights with a city and canal cruise.

  • Enjoy the Heineken Experience and explore Van Gogh’s masterpieces.

  • Travel to Cologne and enjoy a scenic Rhine River cruise.

  • Continue to Frankfurt and explore at your leisure.

  • Journey to Munich, the Bavarian cultural hub.

  • Discover Munich’s history, architecture, and vibrant streets.

  • Bid farewell to Germany and fly home with lasting memories.

city tour with Eiffel Tower Ticket","day_summary":"

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Dive into the world of Dutch brewing with the Heineken Experience, an interactive and immersive journey through the legacy of one of the world’s most famous beers. Join our Travelxploria Representative and Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria as you explore the original Heineken brewery in Amsterdam. Discover the fascinating brewing process, engage in hands-on activities, and experience Heineken’s rich history through state-of-the-art exhibits. End your visit with a perfectly chilled beer, freshly poured straight from the tap. With the Best on-ground Support Staff, Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency, ensures an unforgettable and refreshing experience.

Immerse yourself in the world of a true artistic genius with a guided visit to the Van Gogh Museum. Upon arrival in Cologne, transfer to your hotel and check in. Later, explore the city's captivating blend of modern energy and historic charm, including the iconic Cologne Cathedral and scenic Rhine River promenade, setting the tone for your stay in Germany.

Experience Cologne from a unique and scenic perspective with a relaxing Rhine River cruise, expertly organized by Travelxploria and supported by the best on-ground staff. Glide along the majestic river, taking in breathtaking views of Cologne’s skyline, the iconic Cologne Cathedral, Hohenzollern Bridge, and picturesque riverside parks. This leisurely boat ride offers a blend of history, architecture, and romance, perfect for all travelers. For a truly unforgettable experience, opt for an evening cruise with a delicious dinner and drinks, making it an ideal choice for couples seeking a magical and intimate setting while admiring Cologne’s illuminated landmarks.

Discover Munich’s iconic landmarks on a guided city tour with Travelxploria, perfect for first-time visitors. Our expert representative will take you through Marienplatz, the heart of the city, where you’ll witness the famous Glockenspiel in action. Stroll through the serene English Garden, a vast green oasis in the city, and marvel at the grandeur of Nymphenburg Palace, the former royal residence. This comprehensive tour offers a fascinating insight into Munich’s rich history, stunning architecture, and vibrant culture.

packages.overview:
• Land in Paris and settle into the romantic atmosphere of the city.

  • Explore iconic Paris landmarks and enjoy a scenic Seine River cruise.

  • Visit the Louvre Museum and ascend the Eiffel Tower for panoramic views.

  • Travel to Brussels and explore the city’s historic charm.

  • Discover the medieval beauty of Bruges and Ghent on a full-day tour.

  • Journey to Amsterdam and enjoy the lively Dutch capital.

  • Marvel at the stunning floral displays of Keukenhof Gardens.

  • Experience traditional Dutch villages and countryside life.

  • Bid farewell to Amsterdam and fly back with unforgettable memories.

city tour with Seine River Cruise","day_summary":"

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris, led by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide. Explore iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd Level of the Eiffel Tower, offering a stunning panoramic view of Paris. After a delightful lunch, visit the magnificent Palace of Versailles, a masterpiece of 17th-century French artistry. Later, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, passing Notre Dame, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, followed by the enchanting Paris by Night tour. End your perfect day with a sumptuous dinner. Overnight stay in Paris with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

Amsterdam, the vibrant capital of the Netherlands, is famous for its charming canals, historic architecture, and rich culture. Explore the Canal Ring with a scenic canal cruise, visit world-class museums like the Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum, and take a moment to reflect at the Anne Frank House. Wander through the trendy Jordaan district, enjoy local treats at the Albert Cuyp Market, and soak in the lively atmosphere at a cozy café. Amsterdam offers a perfect blend of history, art, and modern charm, making it a city full of delightful wonders.

packages.package_name: Fairy Tale Journey Through France, Britain & the Netherlands
packages.overview:
Travelxploria's Ultimate European Journey: Explore Iconic Landmarks Across the Continent

Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria as we guide you through the heart of Europe’s most iconic cities, where history, culture, and breathtaking beauty await at every turn. Begin your journey in Paris, where the stunning Eiffel Tower offers panoramic views of the city, and the world-renowned Louvre Museum houses masterpieces like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo. As you wander the historic streets, marvel at the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and stroll along the Champs-Élysées, reaching the imposing Arc de Triomphe.

Next, discover the captivating city of London, where landmarks like Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament dominate the skyline. Explore the ancient halls of the Tower of London, and don’t miss the spectacular view from the London Eye, offering a new perspective on this vibrant city. Venture north to Edinburgh, where Edinburgh Castle sits proudly atop the city’s skyline, and hike up Arthur’s Seat for breathtaking panoramic views of Scotland’s capital.

In Glasgow, enjoy the peaceful tranquility of the Botanic Gardens and discover the fascinating exhibits at the Kelvingrove Art Gallery & Museum. Then, travel to Dublin, where you can explore the historic Trinity College and gaze upon the Book of Kells, an illuminated manuscript that has survived for centuries. While in Ireland, make sure to enjoy a pint at the Guinness Storehouse, where the legacy of Ireland’s famous beer comes to life.

As your journey continues, visit the charming Amsterdam, where a scenic Canal Cruise offers a picturesque way to view the city’s most iconic landmarks, including the Rijksmuseum and the Van Gogh Museum.

Lastly, for music lovers, head to Liverpool, where you can pay tribute to The Beatles at the Beatles Story and explore the city’s historic Royal Albert Dock. With Travelxploria, each destination is carefully curated to give you an immersive and unforgettable European experience.

Today, we have an exciting journey through the Scottish Highlands ahead of us, starting with a coffee and a stroll in Pitlochry, a charming village. Next, we’ll pass through Inverness in northern Scotland, near the mysterious Loch Ness. After, we´ll visit Urquhart Castle (admission included) from where we´ll embark on a boat ride on the dark waters of Loch Ness. Next, we’ll pass by Fort Augustus with its sluice system and Fort William, a tourist center at the foot of Ben Nevis, the highest summit in the United Kingdom. Heading south, we’ll travel through the high plateaus, where snow is often visible, and skirt the picturesque shores of Loch Lomond. We’ll arrive in Glasgow at the end of the day.

packages.package_name: European Odyssey Exploring Iconic Landmarks and Hidden Gems
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let our expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

The adventure continues as we head toward Switzerland, where you'll visit the breathtaking Rhine Falls, Europe’s largest waterfall. Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" VISIT MT. TITLIS - ENJOY CABLE CAR RIDES","day_summary":"

Today, get ready for breathtaking scenery and a once-in-a-lifetime experience with an exhilarating journey to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters, exclusively organized by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Ascend the majestic peak using various cable cars, including the Rotair, the world’s first revolving cable car, offering unrestricted 360-degree views of the dazzling snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine white snowfields, dotted with massive ice boulders. At the summit, dare to walk across the famous Cliff Walk, the highest suspension bridge in Europe, for an adrenaline-pumping experience with spectacular panoramic views. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. Visit the historic Lion Monument and stroll across the iconic Kapellbrücke (Chapel Bridge). Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria has curated the perfect Swiss adventure for you

Take a leisurely stroll along the charming cobblestone streets of Maria Theresien Strasse, where you can relax at an outdoor café, soak in the splendid baroque architecture, and experience the charm of medieval Europe. With the majestic Alps as a backdrop, this setting is nothing short of picture-perfect. Enjoy a comfortable overnight stay at your hotel in Innsbruck or Seefeld, knowing that Travelxploria’s expert representative has ensured an unforgettable experience

 After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara

packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

After a delicious lunch, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, gliding past Paris’ most iconic landmarks. As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mt. Titlis Adventure & Lucerne Charm","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and enriching experiences, accompanied by our expert tour guide and representative. Begin your journey in Vaduz, the charming capital of Liechtenstein, one of the world’s smallest yet most picturesque countries nestled in the Alps. Enjoy a guided mini train ride, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the stunning landscape. Next, visit the world-renowned Swarovski Crystal World in Wattens, where dazzling crystalline masterpieces captivate visitors. Continue to Innsbruck, the enchanting capital of Tyrol, and stroll through Maria Theresien Strasse, lined with historic buildings and lively cafés. Marvel at the iconic Golden Roof, a symbol of Innsbruck’s medieval charm, set against a spectacular Alpine backdrop. After a day filled with beauty and culture, indulge in a sumptuous lunch and dinner before retiring for an overnight stay in Innsbruck.

With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, experience a seamless and luxurious adventure. After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a guided tour of Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with an expert guide from Travelxploria, the best travel agency. Marvel at the city's most iconic landmark, the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, famous for its Gates of Paradise. Explore Piazza della Signoria, an open air museum adorned with Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, the historic bridge spanning the River Arno. Next, journey to Pisa to witness the architectural wonder of the Leaning Tower of Pisa, set within the breathtaking Square of Miracles. After an enriching day, enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner before retiring for the night. Overnight stay in the Tuscany region.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and journey to Rome, the Eternal City, with an experienced Travelxploria guide ensuring a seamless experience. As the best travel agency, we present an immersive tour of Vatican City, the world’s smallest country. Explore the magnificent St. Peter’s Basilica, the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel, and Michelangelo’s masterpiece, The Last Judgement. Next, enjoy a delicious lunch before visiting the iconic Colosseum, followed by the legendary Trevi Fountain, where tossing a coin is said to ensure your return. Discover the Victor Emmanuel Monument and the Roman Forum. If Vatican Museum entry is unavailable due to the Jubilee year, our dedicated representative will arrange Colosseum entry instead. End the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay in Rome.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. Embark on a half-day city tour of Paris, where you’ll explore some of the most iconic landmarks that define this enchanting city. Start by marveling at the majestic Eiffel Tower, followed by a stroll along the Champs-Élysées to reach the Arc de Triomphe. Admire the stunning architecture of the Louvre Museum and the beautiful Notre-Dame Cathedral. After soaking in the essence of Paris, you’ll head towards Rouen, a picturesque town in Normandy known for its medieval charm. En route, enjoy the scenic views of the French countryside before arriving in Rouen, where you’ll explore its stunning Gothic Rouen Cathedral and stroll through the cobblestone streets of its historic center. This excursion offers a perfect blend of Parisian elegance and the rustic allure of Normandy.

packages.package_name: From Canals to Castles: Amsterdam, Berlin & Prague
packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

We went for a girls trip to Thailand on 18th April with TravelXploria first time.From day one I talked to Mr. Sanjib for our trip and he did the best customised trip for us as per our requirement & choices. The hotel ambassador in bangkok was superb. Through the entire trip , the Car he provided is soooo comfortable. In Phuket driver was excellent. In krabi , Island tour was amazing n refreshing! Got all the info through my WhatsApp regarding cab timing, airport pickup n all. Only two things I didn't like . Hotel Ao nang timber house in krabi . Apart from these two things we enjoyed the entire trip. Thanks a lot to Mr. Sanjib for making our trip so smooth n happening. Thanks to TravelXploria entire team for their cooperation. Looking forward for more ...

overview:
Tulip Whispers & Canal Murmurs: The Netherlands Reimagined with Travelxploria

When dawn’s first light glimmers on glassy canals and the air fills with the delicate perfume of blossoms, the Netherlands feels like a waking dream. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, inventive Best Tour Operator, and globally renowned Best International Tour Operator, every moment becomes a brushstroke in your own Dutch masterpiece. Select our Best Package of Netherlands, share wonder on the Best Family package, or let every romantic detail bloom under our Best Honeymoon Planner.

Soft reflections dance beneath Amsterdam’s gabled facades as you glide past silent houseboats. Travelxploria arranges a moonlit canal serenade—handpicked harpists drift melodies across ripples, while lantern-lit cafés on hidden quays offer cinnamon-kissed speculaas and velvet-smooth Dutch cocoa.

Further afield, windmills stand guard over emerald fields where artisan cheesemakers pore over bubbling vats. In Zaanse Schans, children’s laughter twines with the wooden thump of molens’ turning blades under our Best Family package, as little hands shape fresh curds into velvety rounds.

When spring unfolds its rainbow, Keukenhof’s endless tulip cathedrals beckon. Through Travelxploria’s Best Package of Netherlands, you’ll wander secret bulb orchards before sunrise—where dewdrops tremble on petals and horticulturists share whispers of bulb stories handed down through centuries.

Rotterdam pulses with futuristic edge—a Ferris wheel spun into the skyline, avant-garde galleries hidden within shipping containers. Your Best International Tour Operator privileges include a rooftop picnic atop the Markthal, sampling gastronomic riffs on herring sliders while panoramic windows reflect the city’s daring architecture.

In Utrecht, vine-draped wharves cradle intimate cafés beneath sandstone arches. Let our Best Honeymoon Planner orchestrate a floating dinner aboard a silent barge, where orchids drift by on dark waters and church bells toll in the distance—an evening woven from whispered vows and candlelit lullabies.

Beyond the bustle, the quiet village of Giethoorn feels cradled by time itself. Under the Best Family package, paddles part glassy lanes lined with thatched cottages, and dragonflies flit like living jewels across sunlit pools.

Finally, Kinderdijk’s windmills silhouette against burnished skies—17 towering Guardians of Water and Wind. Guided by Travelxploria, you’ll cycle along ancient dikes beneath flaming cotton-candy clouds, each turn revealing new vistas of polder-carved landscapes.

With Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, visionary Best Tour Operator, and world-class Best International Tour Operator—the Netherlands awakens not just as a destination, but as a living poem, ready to be written by you.
